subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of the love of God! The eloquent verses that issued forth from the spiritual throat were presented in the presence of this servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتعل بنار محبه الله اشعار بلیغی که از حنجر روحانی صادر در محضر اینعبد
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
